This type of '''starfighter''' was used by the forces of [[Empress/Legends|Empress]] [[Teta/Legends|Teta]] to protect [[Empress Teta/Legends|Koros Major]] at the time of the [[Great Hyperspace War/Legends|Great Hyperspace War]].

==Appearances==
*[[Tales of the Jedi – The Golden Age of the Sith 1|''Tales of the Jedi – The Golden Age of the Sith'' 1]]
*[[Tales of the Jedi – The Fall of the Sith Empire 4|''Tales of the Jedi – The Fall of the Sith Empire'' 4]]
*[[Tales of the Jedi – The Fall of the Sith Empire 5|''Tales of the Jedi – The Fall of the Sith Empire'' 5]]
